response.step_by_step_log:
1. Scene 1 (00:00-01:02): Identified '男のコになりたい' (Otoko no ko ni naritai) by text. Performer is Noriko Sakai, though performed by VTubers. Searched for '男のコになりたい 酒井法子 lyrics'.
2. Scene 2 (01:03-01:17): Transition segment, no vocals.
3. Scene 3 (01:17-05:00): Identified 'SWEET MEMORIES' by text. Performer is Seiko Matsuda, though performed by VTubers. Searched for 'SWEET MEMORIES 松田聖子 lyrics'.
4. All lyrics found and verified. JSON constructed.
response.global_summary: The video features a compilation of vocal performances by various VTubers, performing two distinct Japanese songs: '男のコになりたい' (Otoko no ko ni naritai) and 'SWEET MEMORIES'.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en: I want to be a boy. I go to the highway, ride my bike to the sea. I follow him, and want to hear his dream. Just for today, I'll untie my ribbon, let myself be a boy, be together until morning. But a chance, someday a chance, when we dance, I'll suddenly return to being a girl. I want to be a boy, I don't know why, I want to travel the world freely. I'll decorate my suit with a rose, decide on the last day. Just for today, I'll fulfill everything, I want to see his true self that he doesn't show to a girl. And a chance, someday a chance, when we dance, it seems I'll become his type. Sweet couple Pi! Pi! Woo be popple Pi! Pi! Sweet couple Pi! Pi! Woo be popple Pi! Pi!

scenes.description: A transition scene with instrumental background music leading into the next song.
Four VTubers perform the song 'SWEET MEMORIES' on a stage with a purple, dreamy aesthetic.

SWEET MEMORIES

SWEET MEMORIES

SWEET MEMORIES
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: It's a nostalgic pain, I had forgotten it long ago. But when I saw you, time turned back. Don't ask me "Are you happy?", I'm not good at lying. I have friends, but I can't burn for them like that. Why is it that only lost dreams look beautiful? The kindness that passed by is now a sweet memory. SWEET MEMORIES Don't kiss me baby we can never be So don't add more pain Please don't hurt me again I have spent so many nights Thinking of you longing for your touch I have once loved you so much We were too young back then, we hurt each other in mischief. Even the faded sadness is now a distant memory. SWEET MEMORIES Why is it that only lost dreams look beautiful? The kindness that passed by is now a sweet memory. SWEET MEMORIES
